image_prompt: A whimsical and slightly absurd scene. A person, with a comically exaggerated expression of frustration, is attempting to eat a bowl of delicious-looking, steaming tomato soup with a large, impractical dinner fork. The soup is spilling, and the fork is clearly ineffective. The background is a cozy, slightly messy kitchen table. The text 'Sopa não se come com garfo.' is subtly integrated into the scene, perhaps etched on the bowl or floating as a thought bubble above the person's head, in a playful, cartoonish font. High detail, vibrant colors, realistic lighting, funny.
short_sentence: Sopa não se come com garfo.
caption: Quem nunca tentou o impossível? 😂 A vida é cheia de verdades inegáveis, e algumas delas são... bem, óbvias! Qual a sua 'verdade universal' favorita que a gente insiste em ignorar? Conta pra gente! 👇 #CoisasObvias #VerdadesIncontestáveis #HumorDoDia #VidaReal #SopaComGarfo
